data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the service menu displayed on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Service menu displayed on Google', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The prior steps focus on creating offers and booking processes, but none specifically address the display of the service menu on Google. This indicates a gap in the necessary functionality to fulfill the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of service menu displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
